description_long: This lantern features a rectangular, slightly tapered body with softly beveled edges and a warm, golden-brown frame. Each face of the lantern is adorned with a large, circular red motif resembling a traditional East Asian symbol, set against a pale, cream-colored background. The surface appears to be made of translucent material, likely glass or paper, allowing light to diffuse softly from within. The top and bottom are flat, with the same motif repeated, suggesting a symmetrical design. The lantern's construction hints at a lightweight, portable object, possibly used for decorative or ceremonial purposes in urban outdoor settings. The overall aesthetic is both functional and ornamental, blending cultural symbolism with practical illumination.
description: A rectangular lantern with golden-brown edges, cream panels, and red circular motifs, likely made of glass or paper. It has a soft, diffused appearance and traditional decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cream panel with a prominent red circular motif centered, framed by golden-brown edges.
description_view_1: Side view is nearly identical to the front, displaying the same motif and color scheme, with slight perspective changes in the frame.
description_view_2: Back view mirrors the front, with the same red motif and cream panel, maintaining the lantern's symmetrical design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the red motif and cream panel, with the golden-brown frame visible along the edges.
